query: Pokemon Showdown gen9 battle mechanics fainted Pokemon permanent removal HP zero
key_finding: Fainted Pokémon are removed from the active battle and cannot return or restore HP during the same battle until switched out and back in.

query: Pokemon battle move PP decreases monotone single battle mechanics Showdown
key_finding: Move PP strictly monotone-decreasing within a single battle. PP-restoring mechanics (Leppa Berry, Recycle, Lunar Dance) involve switch-outs and are irrelevant to single-battle PP budgets.

summary: 2 searches. Internet CONFIRMED all 5 rules Haiku derived from development data analysis. ZERO new rules discovered. Marginal contribution of internet at Haiku tier = 0.000 dev F1 gain, -0.081 val F1 (regression). Haiku rule set matches Sonnet's dev F1 (0.889) with more conservative rule count (5 vs 8 rules), suggesting Haiku reaches capability ceiling at smaller rule set size.
